economic_notes: Government business enterprises and partnerships include: 2190774 Ontario Limited (commercial office rental), Red Rock General Construction Logistics LP (storage and construction), Lake Helen Gas & Variety LP (gas bar and variety store), Nipigon & Red Rock Plumbing & Heating LP (plumbing and heating services). OPG Settlement account held for Band members.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) inability to observe physical inventory of $507,107 for three government business partnerships accounted for on modified equity basis; (2) First Nation did not prepare approved budgets as required by PSAB standards. Six entities fully consolidated and four entities (2190774 Ontario Limited, Red Rock General Construction Logistics LP, Lake Helen Gas & Variety LP, Nipigon & Red Rock Plumbing & Heating LP) accounted for on modified equity basis. Prior year (2022) included a $635,933 legal settlement as a one-time item. Long-term debt of the consolidated entity appears to be nil at Band level (subsidiary 2190774 Ontario Limited paid off $1,805,083 long-term debt during the year). Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from the text provided. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $6,562,103 + CMHC $69,533 + DFO $114,210 + MCSS $424,571 + Ministry of Education $79,181 + MIRR $190,778 + MNR $3,728 + MHLTC $36,716 + MTO $29,032 + Aboriginal Employment and Training $364,471 + Union of Ontario Indians $577,026 = $8,451,349 less repayable to funder adjustment and deferred revenue movements applied; OSR calculated as total revenue $11,093,308 minus estimated government transfers.
